payload.description:
As a procedure author, I want feedback-backed score-version evaluations to pass their generated FeedbackItems samples directly into AccuracyEvaluation, so that scores without embedded data sections can still be compared in the model frontier.

Feature: Feedback-backed model frontier evaluation samples

Scenario: TactusScore has feedback items but no data section
Given a TactusScore score version without a YAML data section
And the feedback evaluation builds labeled samples from FeedbackItems
When the model frontier dispatches a feedback-backed evaluation for that score version
Then the evaluation runs with those labeled samples directly
And it does not fall back to score YAML data loading.

Scenario: Existing evaluation behavior is preserved
Given an accuracy evaluation with an explicit cloud dataset id
When the evaluation is dispatched through the runtime
Then the dataset id path is still used unchanged.
payload.title: Feedback-backed frontier evaluations use explicit samples
